name: SBI ELSS Tax Saver Fund

key_facts.Current NAV: The Current Net Asset Value of the SBI ELSS Tax Saver Fund - Direct Plan as of Jul 09, 2026 is Rs 473.03 for Growth option of its Direct plan.
key_facts.Fund Size: The SBI ELSS Tax Saver Fund - Direct Plan currently holds Assets under Management worth of Rs 30955.01 crore as on May 31, 2026.
key_facts.Expense ratio: The expense ratio of the fund is 1.19% for Direct plan as on Jul 03, 2026.
key_facts.Exit Load: The given fund doesn't attract any Exit Load.
key_facts.Minimum Investment: Minimum investment required is Rs 500 and minimum additional investment is Rs 500. Minimum SIP investment is Rs 500.

performance.Trailing/Category Returns: Its trailing returns over different time periods are: -0.38% (1yr), 18.38% (3yr), 17.48% (5yr) and 15.53% (since launch). Whereas, Category returns for the same time duration are: -1.01% (1yr), 12.65% (3yr) and 12.18% (5yr).

objective: Investment Objective - The scheme seeks capital appreciation through investments in equities, cumulative convertible preference shares and fully convertible debentures and bonds. The scheme was converted into an open-ended plan in November 1999.
extra_notes: Short-term Capital Gain Tax - STCG is not applicable on ELSS schemes since these have a lock-in period of 3 years.
